raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I made a payment for XXXX to my American Express. I was having XXXX and set up my affairs to be in order. I was unaware that a payment account had bounced and caused my account to be unable to clear that large payment. In the process of this matter over 3 times XXXX was added to my American Express making my bill over XXXX! I immediately tried to resolve the problem and they adjusted 1 of the 3 charges. I was able to get the bill to XXXX while they investigated the other 2 charges. I paid in full the total of the actual charges and now I am still being asked to pay that added XXXX two months in a row in excess. I am calling and writing them only to keep getting denied resolution. Please advise me of what to do next because this is not acceptable.
